description: Advanced Tempo trace ingestion analytics. Track span volume, trace throughput by service, ingester health, and compaction performance.

panels.description: Total rate of spans received per second across all Tempo distributors.
panels.title: Spans Received/sec

panels.description: Total bytes received per second by Tempo distributors.
panels.title: Bytes Received/sec

panels.description: Rate of new traces created per second by Tempo ingesters.
panels.title: Traces Created/sec

panels.description: Total number of traces currently live in Tempo ingesters (in-memory, not yet flushed).
panels.title: Live Traces

panels.description: 95th percentile write latency for push/span ingestion routes. Green ≤ 0.3s, Yellow ≤ 0.5s, Red > 0.5s.
panels.title: Write Latency P95

panels.description: Rate of ingestion errors (HTTP 4xx/5xx) on push routes. Green < 1, Yellow < 10, Red ≥ 10.
panels.title: Ingestion Errors

panels.description: Spans received per second over time, broken down by tenant. Stacked area shows relative contribution of each tenant.
panels.title: Spans Received Over Time

panels.description: Bytes ingested per second over time, broken down by cluster.
panels.title: Bytes Ingested Over Time

panels.description: Top 10 tenants ranked by spans received per second. Identifies the heaviest trace producers.
panels.title: Top 10 Tenants by Span Volume

panels.description: Top 10 tenants ranked by traces created per second.
panels.title: Top Tenants by Trace Count

panels.description: Trace distribution across ingesters. Imbalance indicates ring issues.
panels.title: Live Traces per Ingester

panels.description: Rate at which ingesters flush data to backend storage.
panels.title: Ingester Flush Rate

panels.description: Write latency distribution for push routes showing P50, P90, P95, and P99 percentiles.
panels.title: Write Latency Distribution

panels.description: Compaction throughput showing bytes written to backend and objects combined during compaction cycles.
panels.title: Compaction Rate

panels.description: Total blocks in backend storage. Sustained growth without compaction indicates issues.
panels.title: Block List

panels.description: Rate of queries and search requests handled by Tempo queriers.
panels.title: Query Rate

panels.description: Query and search route latency distribution showing P50, P90, P95, and P99 percentiles. Threshold at 2.0s.
panels.title: Query Latency Percentiles

title: Tempo — Trace Ingestion & Throughput Analytics
